description: Stylish and uber cool, these suede desert boots from red tape will add an extra bounce to your step. With a high quality suede upper, a refined, stacked heel and comfortable lace up system, these shoes are the best bet for an instant smart look, especially when you team them with jeans or chinos. Upper Mid-top nubuck upper for added durability and style Rounded toe design Two-hole lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Softly padded tongue to protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blisters Suede wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and support Cushioned footbed for extra comfort Leather inner for absorbing moisture and keeping feet dry Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption with a stacked heel Textured pattern through out the outsole for improved grip and traction shoe care Use a suede brush to dust suede surface Do not store in direct sunlight
